caption: A person holds a basketball trading card featuring Chris Mullin, displaying the text "AWARD-WINNING" and "CHRIS MULLIN." The card is autographed and describes the player's team as "GOLDEN STATE WARRIORS." The scene is set against a backdrop featuring a red and black surface with the "JASPYS" logo and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" visible on screen. In the background, a smaller video window shows a man with a beard wearing a black shirt sitting in a room with shelves. As the sequence progresses, the person's hands move the card, shifting its angle to show its holographic, reflective surface. In the final moments, the card is tilted further, causing light to shimmer across the image of the player and the signature. Throughout the clip, the surrounding environment and the small inset video of the man remain constant.
